Markup Sampler
==============

Málaga λ meets 😀 in **bold**, *emphasis*, and ``inline code``.
See the `project site <https://example.org>`_ and :ref:`sample target <sample>`.

.. _sample:

.. note:: A compact directive
   :class: friendly

   Roles such as :code:`(+ 1 2)` and substitution |spark| work here.

.. |spark| replace:: ✨ astral 🚀

Term
  A definition with citation [Guide]_ and footnote [1]_.

.. [Guide] A concise bibliography entry.
.. [1] A numbered note with `anonymous link <https://example.net>`__.

Example::

   print("naïve 🌍")

--verbose  explain the selected option
